title: Pierogi Ruskie with Pan-Seared Steak
description: A hearty and flavorful dish featuring pan-seared steak served with traditional Russian-style pierogi filled with a tangy and creamy mashed potato and cheese mixture.
instructions: 1. Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook pierogi according to package instructions.
2. While pierogi cooks, heat butter in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
3. Sear steak in skillet for 3-4 minutes per side, or until cooked to desired level of doneness.
4. Transfer steak to a plate and let rest for 5 minutes before slicing.
5. In a separate pan, sauté minced onion and minced fresh dill until softened.
6. Combine mashed potato, grated cheddar cheese, sautéed onion and dill, salt, and pepper in a bowl.
7. Fill cooked pierogi with mashed potato mixture and top with tangy sour cream.
8. Slice steak against the grain and serve with pierogi.
9. Garnish with additional fresh dill and serve immediately.
